evals.name: rag-pipeline-five-steps
evals.prompt: 用 arch-diagram-builder 画 RAG Pipeline：用户问题 → Retriever → Vector DB → LLM → 回答输出，5 步演示，保存到 docs/diagrams/rag-pipeline.html
assertions: nodes include retriever and llm semantic colors (green/purple in STEPS)

evals.name: mcp-protocol-bidirectional
evals.prompt: 画 MCP 协议原理架构图：Client ↔ MCP Server ↔ Tools，强调双向调用，6 步，docs/diagrams/mcp-protocol.html
evals.expected_output: 双向连线分车道，无堆叠
assertions: at least 2 curved conn paths (C in path d)

evals.name: minimal-two-node-smoke
evals.prompt: arch-diagram-builder 最小 smoke：API → Agent 两个节点，3 步，docs/diagrams/smoke-two-node.html

trigger_evals.query: 画一个 RAG 的动态架构图
交互式架构图 MCP 协议
